extensionName.description: Extension name shown in the add-on manager.

extensionShortName.description: Short name shown in compose toolbar.

extensionDescription.description: Extension description shown in the add-on manager.

goTo.description: Label for the link to the addy.io web UI. $1 is the hostname.

errorInvalidUrl.message: Addy URL must start with "http://" or "https://".

permissionDeniedSuffix.message: was denied. Settings were not saved. Grant the host permission to use a custom server URL.

disable.description: Disables the alias on the Addy server so it stops forwarding.

disableHint.message: Disables this alias on the Addy server (stops all forwarding).

reenable.description: Re-enables a disabled alias on the Addy server.

deleteAlias.description: Permanently deletes the alias from the Addy server.

deleteHint.message: Permanently deletes this alias from the Addy server.

noExistingAliases.message: No existing aliases for this domain.

noRecipientsMessage.message: Add at least one address to the To/CC/BCC field first.

noApiKeyMessage.message: No API key is set. Opening settings…
noApiKeyMessage.description: Shown briefly in the alias window when no API key is configured.

replaceWithAddyAlias.description: Context menu item shown when right-clicking an address chip in the compose window.
